scripts.start:stencil: pnpm --filter @inclusiv-ds/button build && pnpm --filter @inclusiv-ds/input build && pnpm --filter @inclusiv-ds/badge build && pnpm --filter @inclusiv-ds/spinner build && pnpm --filter @inclusiv-ds/typography build && pnpm --filter @inclusiv-ds/checkbox build && pnpm --filter @inclusiv-ds/radio build && pnpm --filter @inclusiv-ds/toggle build && pnpm --filter @inclusiv-ds/form-field build && pnpm --filter @inclusiv-ds/dialog build && pnpm --filter @inclusiv-ds/container build && pnpm --filter @inclusiv-ds/stencil-playground dev
scripts.stencil:build: pnpm --filter @inclusiv-ds/button build && pnpm --filter @inclusiv-ds/input build && pnpm --filter @inclusiv-ds/badge build && pnpm --filter @inclusiv-ds/spinner build && pnpm --filter @inclusiv-ds/typography build && pnpm --filter @inclusiv-ds/checkbox build && pnpm --filter @inclusiv-ds/radio build && pnpm --filter @inclusiv-ds/toggle build && pnpm --filter @inclusiv-ds/form-field build && pnpm --filter @inclusiv-ds/dialog build && pnpm --filter @inclusiv-ds/container build
scripts.release: pnpm build && changeset publish && pnpm validate:cdn
